---
title: "Elizabeth Colborne, Lady Seaton"
---

## Elizabeth Colborne, Lady Seaton

**Dates:** (7 March 1790-28 Nov 1872)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Sister of the Rev. John Yonge of Puslinch, she married  (21 June 1814) Sir John Colborne, 1st Lord Seaton (1778-1863).

### Letters

- Letter from June 2nd 1896
- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]
- Letter from May 9th [1870] 
- Letter from February 28, 1869
- Letter from [November 1868]
- Letter from May 19th [1866]
- Letter from July 13th [31 July 1863][[footnote:2]]
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]
- Letter from 26 Septr 1857
- Letter from Monday 17th April [1854]
- Letter from [July 1853]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
